name: Cranberry-Buttermilk Scones
recipeIngredient: 10 tablespoons (1 1/4 sticks) chilled, unsalted butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 375°F.
2. Butter two 9-inch diameter cake pans.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, 1/4 cup sugar, baking powder, and salt.
4. Add butter, rub into the mixture with fingertips until it resembles coarse meal.
5. Add cranberries.
6. Whisk buttermilk and 2 eggs in a small bowl. Stir into dry ingredients.
7. Turn dough out onto lightly floured surface. Knead gently just until a soft dough forms.
8. Divide dough into 2 pieces. Form each piece into a ball.
9. Transfer each ball to one prepared pan; press dough into an 8-inch diameter round.
10. Using a sharp knife, score the top of each round into 8 wedges.
11. Whisk remaining egg with 1 tablespoon water in a small bowl. Brush mixture over scones.
12. Sprinkle with 2 tablespoons granulated sugar.
13. Bake scones until golden, about 30 minutes.
14. Cool on wire racks for 5 minutes. Invert onto platters. Turn right side up.
15. Cut along score marks. Serve warm.
